---
title: "Members"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="/assets/javascript/clear_filter_button.js" defer></script>
      <script src="/assets/javascript/change_categories_header.js" defer></script>
      <script src="/assets/javascript/custom_filter.js" defer></script>

listing:
  - id: lmu-members
    contents: 
      - people
    template: listings/active-lmu-members-listing.ejs
    sort: "surname asc"
    categories: unnumbered
    page-size: 999

  - id: affiliate-members
    contents: 
      - people
    template: listings/active-affiliate-listing.ejs
    sort: "surname asc"
    categories: unnumbered
    page-size: 999

  - id: former-members
    contents: 
      - people
    template: listings/alumni-lmu-members-affiliates-listing.ejs
    sort: "surname asc"
anchor-sections: false


---

```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
member_type <- c("lmu-individual", "affiliate")
member_status <- "active"

qmd_files <- dir("people", pattern = "\\.qmd$", full.names = TRUE)
active_members_count <- sum(
  sapply(qmd_files, function(path) {
    memberships <- yaml::read_yaml(path)[["memberships"]]
    if (is.null(memberships)) return(0)
    sum(vapply(
      memberships,
      function(membership) {
        as.integer(
          membership[["type"]] %in% member_type &&
            membership[["status"]] == member_status
        )
      },
      integer(1)
    ))
  })
)
```



<style>
.osc-members-description a,
.osc-members-description i{
  color:#00883A;
  text-decoration:none;
}
.osc-members-description i{
  font-size:0.9rem;
  font-weight:500;
}
</style>
:::{.osc-members-description}
Our `r active_members_count` members actively support the goals of the OSC and contribute to our activities such as training, community building, meta-research, and liaison with stakeholders. [Join us](/about/join-us.qmd) <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>.

<!-- native quarto filter is isolated per listing id at the moment, so we would end up with multiple filters. To prevent this, creating a global filter that allows filtering across all listings regardless of their id.-->

```{=html}
<div class="input-group input-group-sm w-100 w-md-75 mb-3">
  <span class="input-group-prepend input-group-text"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></span>
  <input type="text" class="form-control form-control-lg" id="global-filter" placeholder="Search by name or faculty" aria-label="Search by name or faculty">
</div>
```

:::
## LMU Members

::: {#lmu-members}
:::

## Affiliate Members

::: {#affiliate-members}
:::


## Former Members

::: {#former-members}
:::
